texto: The worst form of snobbery is to deny information
autor: to anyone at all. Always remember that. Bas as it is to look down on another human being: to act as censor? Unforgivable.
explicacao: Citação de to anyone at all. Always remember that. Bas as it is to look down on another human being: to act as censor? Unforgivable. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The worst form of snobbery is to deny information” articula reflexao, matthew-blakstad, sockpuppet em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como sockpuppet.
